summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU stuck at 99% on Morpheus devices (VOY5200,VOY8200)
feature: Android DFU (Device Firmware Update) - Morpheus devices
scenario: Language update on Morpheus devices gets stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes, increasing total update time from 1-2 minutes to 10+ minutes
description_clean: Language update (LANG UPDATE) gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes on Morpheus devices (VOY5200, VOY8200) before completing. Previously, language changes took 1-2 minutes, but now they take 10 minutes or more. Expected behavior is completion within 2 minutes.
steps: 1. Initiate a language update (LANG UPDATE) on a Morpheus device (e.g., VOY5200 or VOY8200).
2. Observe the progress of the language update.
3. Note that the update gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes.
4. Wait for the update to eventually complete.
expected: The language update should complete within 2 minutes.
actual: The language update gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes, taking 10 minutes or more to complete.
